vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inaccurate regarding current biological presence. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/unidentifiable. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are not visually distinct in the black pot. P3 (Pothos) is the only identifiable specimen.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No evidence of String of Nickels in the yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No evidence of Mexican Mint.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present: Pothos leaf and white rabbit anchor confirmed.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No evidence of Silver Guest.

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty soil, no visible plant matter.
plant_audit.P2_P4_Black_Pot: Contains a single, struggling Pothos leaf and significant debris (eggshells).
plant_audit.P3_Pothos: The primary occupant is a single, chlorotic leaf with a necrotic spot.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears dry and compacted across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of crushed eggshells in the black pot; electronic component (IC/header) present on the desk surface.

temporal_deltas.T_earliest_to_T_minus_4: Initial state shows Pothos leaf and empty yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.T_minus_4_to_T_minus_2: Introduction of a small electronic component (IC) on the desk surface.
temporal_deltas.T_minus_2_to_T_minus_1: Significant drop in ambient light, obscuring details.
temporal_deltas.T_minus_1_to_current: Return of light reveals the Pothos leaf remains in a state of stasis/decline.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The Pothos (P3) is in poor health, evidenced by a necrotic lesion and lack of turgor. The other pots are effectively barren, indicating a failure of the intended biome.
anomalies: Crushed eggshells in P3/P4 pot (likely calcium supplement attempt).
Electronic component (IC) placed on the desk surface.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is in a state of advanced neglect. The Pothos is the sole survivor, showing signs of nutrient deficiency or environmental stress. The yellow pot (P1) is entirely devoid of life. The presence of non-botanical debris (eggshells, electronics) suggests an experimental or disorganized maintenance approach.
